summary: Sr. Engineer to Jr. Engineer Assignment Workflow - Backend API Testing Complete. All 4 new endpoints tested and working correctly. Fixed frontend bug where handleAssignJr was sending jr_engineer_id in body instead of query param.

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 core tests passed, 6 skipped due to rate limiting or no pending visits)

seed_data_creation: Assigned site visit to Suresh Patel (sr_site_engineer) and assigned Ramesh Kumar (site_engineer) as Jr. Engineer during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for Sr->Jr Engineer assignment workflow are fully functional. Frontend fix applied - handleAssignJr now sends jr_engineer_id as query param. 7 Jr. Engineers available (site_engineer + planning roles). 3 site visits exist in system.

GET /api/crm/jr-engineers.details: Returns 7 users with site_engineer and planning roles. Correctly denies access to regular site_engineer (403). Works for sr_site_engineer and super_admin.

GET /api/crm/my-site-visits.details: Returns visits with jr_engineer_id, jr_engineer_name, jr_engineer_phone, assigned_to_me_as fields. Works for sr_site_engineer, site_engineer, and super_admin.

POST /api/crm/leads/{lead_id}/assign-jr-.details: Sr. Site Engineer can assign Jr. Engineer. Regular site_engineer correctly denied (403). Returns 400 when jr_engineer_id missing.

POST /api/crm/leads/{lead_id}/complete-s.details: site_engineer role can mark visit as done. Updates visit_status to 'completed' and current_stage_id to 'stg_sv_done'.

fix_applied: Fixed frontend SiteEngineerDashboard.jsx line 1113: Changed axios.post to send jr_engineer_id as query parameter instead of request body
